sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal.

Piel, to scoff at, to scorn. Eze 16:31, “thou art not like a harlot לְקַלֵּס אֶתְנָן who scoffs at her hire,” sc. that more may be given. Well rendered by the Vulg. nec facta es sicut meretrix fastidio augens pretium.

Hithpael, id., followed by בְּ 2Ki 2:23 Eze 22:5 Hab 1:10. Hence-
